turns.user: I will provide you with the url: https://www.dataguard.com/cyber-security/threats. Please help me identify the top three risks
turns.assistant_text:
Here are the top three cyber security risks identified from the report:

- **Ransomware**: A significant threat that targets data and systems, often leading to financial loss and operational disruption. [Source](https://www.dataguard.com/cyber-security/threats)
- **Social Engineering**: Techniques used to manipulate individuals into divulging confidential information, posing a risk to both data and systems. [Source](https://www.dataguard.com/cyber-security/threats)
- **Insider Threats**: Risks that arise from individuals within the organization who may misuse their access to harm the organization. [Source](https://www.dataguard.com/cyber-security/threats)

For more details, you can visit the full report [here](https://www.dataguard.com/cyber-security/threats).

items.title: Cyber Security Threats: Types, Impacts & Protection Guide
items.summary:
# Cyber security threats:What to defend against and how

- Cyber threats are rising in sophistication, targeting data, systems, and people across all businesses
- ISO 27001 provides a structured, risk-based framework to identify and mitigate evolving security threats like ransomware, social engineering, or insider threats
- Strong controls, continuous monitoring, training, and threat intelligence reduce breach impact and build stakeholder trust

Book a demo

![Cybersecurity Threats](https://www.dataguard.com/hs-fs/hubfs/cybersecurity_pillar-1.webp?width=400&name=cybersecurity_pillar-1.webp)

Join **4,000+** companies who are driving their security and compliance objectives with DataGuard
